title: NoSignGUI+
description: Allows toggling the sign editing menu ON and OFF with config support.
body:
# Notice

**I've started doing Minecraft comissions in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Ce6Vty6khA)!**

# NoSignGUI+

A simple mod that allows you to toggle the sign editor interface on & off with config support!
Useful for CubeCraft's Pillars of Fortune players & trappers!

The default toggle key is `Right Ctrl`. You can change it in the **Key Binds** menu.
